title: Real-Time Fraud Monitoring
summary: Detect risky transactions in near real time with a production scoring API, drift checks, and analyst-friendly triage summaries.
knowledge_base: Real-Time Fraud Monitoring is positioned as a Fintech starter that emphasizes fast iteration, clear documentation, and production-friendly interfaces.
The primary value proposition is: Detect risky transactions in near real time with a production scoring API, drift checks, and analyst-friendly triage summaries.
Recommended operating model: ship a small API, add observability, validate outputs with stakeholder review, and monitor the top business KPI every week.
Typical stakeholders include analytics, operations, product, and leadership teams working on fraud, streaming, risk.
